d.desc: Made by Sheikz - inspired by Luxthos weakaura style

c.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local perRow = 8
    local w, h = 26, 26
    local hSpace, vSpace = 4, 4
    local n = #activeRegions
    local i = 1
    while i <= n do
        local rowCount = perRow
        if n - i + 1 < perRow then rowCount = n - i + 1 end
        local totalW = rowCount * w + (rowCount - 1) * hSpace
        local startX = -totalW / 2 + w / 2
        local row = math.floor((i - 1) / perRow)
        for k = 0, rowCount - 1 do
            newPositions[i + k] = { startX + k * (w + hSpace), row * (h + vSpace) }
        end
        i = i + rowCount
    end
end

controlledChildren: Runemaster Riftblade SPEC Buff - Engraving MH
Runemaster Riftblade SPEC Buff - Engraving OH

c.id: Runemaster Riftblade SPEC Buff - Engraving MH
c.customText:
function(expirationTime, duration, progress, dur, name, icon, stacks)
  if not name then return "" end
  name = string.lower(name)
  if string.find(name, "frost") then return "Fr" end
  if string.find(name, "fire") then return "F" end
  if string.find(name, "arcane") then return "Ar" end
  if string.find(name, "air") then return "A" end
  if string.find(name, "water") then return "W" end
  if string.find(name, "earth") then return "E" end
  return string.upper(string.sub(name, 1, 1))
end

c.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local perRow = 9
    local w, h = 24, 24
    local hSpace, vSpace = 4, 4
    local n = #activeRegions
    local i = 1
    while i <= n do
        local rowCount = perRow
        if n - i + 1 < perRow then rowCount = n - i + 1 end
        local totalW = rowCount * w + (rowCount - 1) * hSpace
        local startX = -totalW / 2 + w / 2
        local row = math.floor((i - 1) / perRow)
        for k = 0, rowCount - 1 do
            newPositions[i + k] = { startX + k * (w + hSpace), row * (h + vSpace) }
        end
        i = i + rowCount
    end
end
